Lucrecia Franco

Copied

As the 2024 Paris Olympics come to an end, it is time to reflect on the moments of glory and inspiration that captured the hearts of millions of people across the globe. Many of those moments came from Latin American athletes.

Lucrecia Franco reports from Rio Janeiro.

For more, check out our exclusive content onCGTN Nowand subscribe to our weekly newsletter,The China Report.
